testcase.name: test_order_with_explicit_customerId_no_linkSuggestion
testcase.failure: tests/test_bug_fixes_iteration24.py:165: in test_order_with_explicit_customerId_no_linkSuggestion assert response.status_code == 200, f"Order creation failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Order creation failed: {"status":400,"message":"\"customerId\" is not allowed"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_confirm_link_requires_customerId

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'customerId' in 'customerid required' + where 'customerid required' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf80850e63230>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf80850e63230> = 'customerId required'.lower + where 'customerId required' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf80850b27d00>('message', '') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf80850b27d00> = {'message': 'customerId required', 'status': 400}.get + where {'message': 'customerId required', 'status': 400} = json() + where json = <Response [400]>.json

testcase.failure: tests/test_bug_fixes_iteration24.py:457: in test_confirm_link_requires_customerId assert "customerId" in response.json().get("message", "").lower() E AssertionError: assert 'customerId' in 'customerid required' E + where 'customerid required' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf80850e63230>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf80850e63230> = 'customerId required'.lower E + where 'customerId required' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf80850b27d00>('message', '') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf80850b27d00> = {'message': 'customerId required', 'status': 400}.get E + where {'message': 'customerId required', 'status': 400} = json() E + where json = <Response [400]>.json
